name: io.github.Braynexservices/nigeria-electricity
description: Read-only Nigerian electricity meter validation + DisCo list via VTpass (free keys). No payments.

environmentVariables.name: ELECTRICITY_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Provider selector — "mock" (default, offline fixtures) or "vtpass" for live data.

environmentVariables.name: VTPASS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: VTpass API key — required when ELECTRICITY_PROVIDER=vtpass.

environmentVariables.name: VTPASS_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: VTpass public key (PK_...) — required when ELECTRICITY_PROVIDER=vtpass.

environmentVariables.name: VTPASS_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: VTpass secret key (SK_...) — required when ELECTRICITY_PROVIDER=vtpass.

environmentVariables.name: VTPASS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Set to https://vtpass.com/api for production (default is the VTpass sandbox).
